rationale: The wff grammar is restated inductively here, and its clauses directly invoke atomic formulas ('every atomic formula is a wff', the base case) and variables (the quantifier clause 'x is a variable'), so def:atomic-formula and def:variable are load-bearing and were missing.
notes: Redundancy flag: def:formula (0064) and def:wff-pred (this node) are near-duplicate presentations of the same formula set (both give the inductive grammar). The kept def:formula edge may be circular/redundant -- reviewer to reconcile the two 'formula' nodes. Connective/quantifier formation steps are ambient.
